title: Warrior King
overview: In this epic true story inspired by the legend of King Gesar, a young man grows up in exile in a world overrun by demons and monsters. When evil forces threaten his home, he returns to save his people and embrace his destiny as great hero and ruler.

trailers.title: Warrior King | Official Trailer - Exclusively in Theaters August 25
